mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.login_id, u.phone_number, u.phone_verified FROM user_profile p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile ( user_id, desired_job, desired_industry, education, career, projects, skills, certificates, languages, portfolio_links, job_preferences, personal_info, activities, account_links, chat_profiles, resume_text, self_intro, preferences ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{desiredJob}, #{desiredIndustry}, #{education}, #{career}, #{projects}, #{skills}, #{certificates}, #{languages}, #{portfolioLinks}, #{jobPreferences}, #{personalInfo}, #{activities}, #{accountLinks}, #{chatProfiles}, #{resumeText}, #{selfIntro}, #{preferences} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE desired_job = VALUES(desired_job), desired_industry = VALUES(desired_industry), education = VALUES(education), career = VALUES(career), projects = VALUES(projects), skills = VALUES(skills), certificates = VALUES(certificates), languages = VALUES(languages), portfolio_links = VALUES(portfolio_links), job_preferences = VALUES(job_preferences), personal_info = VALUES(personal_info), activities = VALUES(activities), account_links = VALUES(account_links), chat_profiles = VALUES(chat_profiles), resume_text = VALUES(resume_text), self_intro = VALUES(self_intro), preferences = VALUES(preferences), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET login_id = #{loginId}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, phone_verified = CASE WHEN #{phoneNumber} IS NULL OR #{phoneNumber} = '' THEN 0 WHEN phone_number = #{phoneNumber} THEN phone_verified ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{userId}
